twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.description: Protect your account with two-factor authentication. You will need an app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
twoFactor.loginOnlyNotice: This feature only applies to email/password login. Google sign-in (OAuth2) uses your Google account security.
twoFactor.verifyDescription: Enter the code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.backupCodeHint: Or use a backup code (8 characters)
